description: This source file defines Express.js route handlers for the orchestration API endpoints in a server application. It routes HTTP requests related to starting orchestrations, running workflows, fetching build statuses, linking uploads, extracting and normalizing documents, generating persona drafts, and finalizing personas. The routes invoke methods from the orchestrationService and handle responses and errors accordingly.

methods.name: router.post('/start')
methods.description: Starts a new orchestration session, creating a build/workflow.

methods.name: router.post('/run-all')
methods.description: Runs the full build workflow end-to-end, including upload, extraction, normalization, and persona drafting.

methods.name: router.get('/builds/:id')
methods.description: Retrieves the orchestration record for a specific build ID.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/link-upload')
methods.description: Links uploaded files and documents to an existing build.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/extract-normalize')
methods.description: Derives normalized text from linked documents for a specific build.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/generate-draft')
methods.description: Generates a persona draft based on normalized text.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/finalize')
methods.description: Finalizes the persona, saving the final blob and creating a new version if needed.
